body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Hubert device + Control Station split
body.intention: I intend that the Hubert/Control Station split is verified as shipped with no dev tools left unreachable.
body.description:
**What changed:** Hubert device created owning lab/+infrastructure; Control Station stripped to breaker panel; dev tools moved to Hubert fascia.
**Predicted unintended effects:** Dev tools temporarily unreachable if gate sequence violated; Hubert fascia may not load if device fails to start; breaker toggles may not have backend wiring yet.
**Signals to watch:** Control Station shows only breakers. Hubert tab shows all 6 dev tool links. All links resolve. No 404s on Goals/Decisions/etc pages.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-23 or when T-control-station-breakers-only closes.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe and annotate: shipped / partial / not shipped
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
